metadata.description: Copilot CLI plugins for worktree isolation, service lifecycle, inter-agent communication, GitHub Codespaces management, local container fleets, MCP bridging, session logging, context-window handoff, effort planning, and CLI customization

plugins.name: agent-worktrees
plugins.description: Worktree isolation system for concurrent Copilot CLI sessions - lifecycle management, finalization, cleanup, service discovery, and deployment patterns for monorepos

plugins.name: agent-bridge
plugins.description: Persistent inter-agent communication service - session management, SSE event streaming, agent subprocess spawning, and an ACP-over-WebSocket transport (+ built-in status UX) for external ACP clients like acp-ui

plugins.name: agent-codespaces
plugins.description: GitHub Codespaces lifecycle management, SSH transport, credential relay, and agent-bridge provider integration

plugins.name: agent-containers
plugins.description: Local Docker dev-container fleet management, lease broker, and agent-bridge container: namespace resolver

plugins.name: agent-mcp
plugins.description: Swiss-army MCP bridge - wrap an upstream MCP server (HTTP or stdio) as a local stdio MCP, inject host credentials, and apply a decorator stack (filter, rename, defer, code-mode, storage, transform)

plugins.name: agent-logger
plugins.description: Reusable Copilot CLI session logging - segment sessions into digestible chunks, write Markdown session logs, sync raw sessions to a configurable target, and optionally run a scheduled orchestrator that crunches a backlog into committed logs

plugins.name: context-handoff
plugins.description: Context window monitoring and session handoff - a Copilot CLI session extension that tracks token utilization and nudges toward a continuation prompt before auto-compaction, plus the /handoff skill

plugins.name: efforts
plugins.description: Efforts planning system - comprehensive planning folders that represent a stretch of work (premise + plan + validation plan + journal + participant coordination), with a README-as-shared-contract; ships the planning-efforts and efforts-setup skills

plugins.name: visions
plugins.description: Visions system - persistent, in-place-revised north-star documents stating what a system/service/tool/product is ultimately meant to be (purpose + concepts + expected features + expected behaviors); intent-level, not a specification; efforts are carved from the vision-vs-reality delta. Ships the envisioning and visions-setup skills

plugins.name: customizing-copilot
plugins.description: Customize and extend the Copilot CLI - authoring skills, defining sub-agents, registering MCP servers, and installing plugins - with the per-skill folder conventions and Agent Skills best practices; ships the authoring-skills, defining-subagents, registering-mcp-servers, and installing-plugins skills

plugins.name: agent-dispatch
plugins.description: Portable agent task-queue + per-host coordinator: a single-writer SQLite leased work queue (six-state model, capability-gated atomic claim, affinity routing, lease recovery) so agents coordinate without push latency or an account per agent.
